relationships: ber:Akk medden llan ttinin-d dakken William d tawaɣit itteddun ɣef sin n yiqejjiren
ber:Lezzayer Tamaneɣt teččuṛ d medden yernu llan deg-s yidafasen
ber:Tamdint n Lezzayer teččuṛ d medden yernu llan deg-s yidafasen
ber:Sami ur yezmir ara ad d-yerr ɣef tuttriwin n medden akk
ber:Aduktur Bakir yella yetteddu ad idawi medden deg yixxamen-nsen
ber:Ur d-mazal ara medden ay yesseqdacen adelgas n usawal
ber:Acḥal n medden ay mazal ssawalen iles-nwen﹖
ber:A win yufan ad tedduḍ d medden akk s tgadda
ber:A win yufan ad teddud d medden akk s tgadda
ber:A win yufan ad teddumt d medden akk s tgadda
ber:A win yufan ad teddum d medden akk s tgadda
ber:Qqimen d isragen nitni ssawalen ɣef medden
ber:Anwa ay d Ziri-a ayɣef ssawalen akk medden﹖
